1.gl: properly, royalty, i.e. (abstractly) rule, or (concretely) a realm (literally or figuratively)
the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
1.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
3.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

14.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
14.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

16.gl: something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expres
16.kj: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech,

17.gl: a calling out, i.e. (concretely) a popular meeting, especially a religious congregation (Jewish synagogue, or Christian community of members on earth or saints in heaven or both)
17.dv: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G2564 (καλέω);

18.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
18.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

19.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
19.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

21.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)
an intensive form of , to go); to send forth, in various applications (as follow)
21.kj: cry, forgive, forsake, lay aside, leave, let (alone, be, go, have), omit, put (send) away, remit, suffer, yield up

the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
23.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);
probably from G939 (βάσις) (through the notion of a foundation of power);
